user_text:
You are composing the visual narrative arc for a 152.4s
solo Bayati performance, divided into 30 5-second
cycles. You see the full track in advance: a mel-spectrogram, a
five-panel DSP timeline (RMS / centroid / onset / Hijaz events /
silence), the per-cycle deterministic prose, and the Bayati
visual register reference photos.

### TRACK CORPUS PROSE

[cycle 0 · t=5s] Moderate intensity, building. Balanced timbre. Sparse articulation. Tonal center B with secondary emphasis on C. Early in the performance, opening territory.
[cycle 1 · t=10s] Moderate intensity, easing. Bright timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center G. Early in the performance, opening territory.
[cycle 2 · t=15s] Moderate intensity, sustained. Balanced timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center E. Early in the performance, opening territory.
[cycle 3 · t=20s] Intense, falling. Warm timbre. Sparse articulation. Tonal center B. Developing.
[cycle 4 · t=25s] Intense, falling. Bright timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center A. Developing.
[cycle 5 · t=30s] Intense, falling. Bright timbre. Rapid articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on E. Developing.
[cycle 6 · t=35s] Moderate intensity, rising sharply. Balanced timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on E. Developing.
[cycle 7 · t=40s] Tahwil: tonal gravity has shifted to the ghammaz. Intense, rising sharply. Balanced timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center G. Developing.
[cycle 8 · t=45s] Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Moderate intensity, falling. Bright timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on F#. Developing.
[cycle 9 · t=50s] Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Moderate intensity, easing. Balanced timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on G. Developing.
[cycle 10 · t=55s] Quiet, sustained. Dark timbre. Very sparse articulation with space. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on G#. Developing.
[cycle 11 · t=60s] Intense, falling. Balanced timbre. Rapid articulation. Tonal center G. Mid-performance.
[cycle 12 · t=65s] Intense, building. Balanced timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center E. Mid-performance.
[cycle 13 · t=70s] Tahwil: tonal gravity has shifted to the ghammaz. Intense, rising sharply. Bright timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center G. Mid-performance.
[cycle 14 · t=75s] Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Peak intensity, building. Bright timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on A. Mid-performance.
[cycle 15 · t=80s] Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Peak intensity, rising sharply. Balanced timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center B with secondary emphasis on C. Mid-performance.
[cycle 16 · t=85s] Peak intensity, falling. Balanced timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center B. Mid-performance.
[cycle 17 · t=90s] Intense, falling. Balanced timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on A. Mid-performance.
[cycle 18 · t=95s] Tahwil: tonal gravity has shifted to the ghammaz. Quiet, sustained. Dark timbre. Very sparse articulation with space. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on A. Mid-performance.
[cycle 19 · t=100s] Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Quiet, falling. Balanced timbre. Sparse articulation with space. Tonal center F# with secondary emphasis on G. Mid-performance.
[cycle 20 · t=105s] Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Moderate intensity, easing. Warm timbre. Sparse articulation. Tonal center G. Mid-performance.
[cycle 21 · t=110s] Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Phrase break. Quiet, sustained. Warm timbre. Very sparse articulation with space. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on A. Mid-performance.
[cycle 22 · t=115s] Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Moderate intensity, sustained. Bright timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on E. Mid-performance.
[cycle 23 · t=120s] Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Phrase break. Quiet, sustained. Warm timbre. Sparse articulation with space. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on A. Deep into the performance.
[cycle 24 · t=125s] Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Quiet, sustained. Balanced timbre. Sparse articulation. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on A. Deep into the performance.
[cycle 25 · t=130s] Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Moderate intensity, sustained. Balanced timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center C with secondary emphasis on E. Deep into the performance.
[cycle 26 · t=135s] Intense, easing. Balanced timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on E. Deep into the performance.
[cycle 27 · t=140s] Moderate intensity, building. Warm timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center A. Deep into the performance.
[cycle 28 · t=145s] Moderate intensity, easing. Warm timbre. Rapid articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on E. Deep into the performance.
[cycle 29 · t=150s] Much silence. Phrase break. Quiet, easing. Warm timbre. Sparse articulation. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on A. Deep into the performance.

### EVENT TIMELINE

- cycle 7 (t=40.0s) — tahwil
- cycle 13 (t=70.0s) — tahwil
- cycle 18 (t=95.0s) — tahwil
- cycle 21 (t=110.0s) — phrase-break
- cycle 23 (t=120.0s) — phrase-break
- cycle 29 (t=150.0s) — phrase-break

### TASK

Compose the arc. Output **only** a single JSON object matching this
schema, no preface, no commentary, no markdown fences:

{
  "track_id": "<string>",
  "duration_s": <number>,
  "cycle_count": <number>,
  "overall_arc": [{ "act_index": <int>, "name": "<string>", "cycle_range": [<int>,<int>], "intent": "<string>" }, ...],
  "per_cycle_intent": [{ "cycle": <int>, "active_act": <int>, "intent": "<string>", "energy_hint": "low|rising|high|falling" }, ...],
  "element_vocabulary": {
    "anchors": ["<string>", ...],
    "palette_progression": [{ "cycle_range": [<int>,<int>], "palette": "<string>" }, ...],
    "introduce_at": { "<motif>": <int>, ... },
    "retire_at": { "<motif>": <int>, ... }
  },
  "foreshadow_pairs": [{ "plant_at": <int>, "pay_off_at": <int>, "note": "<string>" }, ...],
  "anticipation_offsets_ms": { "<cycle_idx>": <int in [-500,0]>, ... },
  "model": "claude-opus-4-7",
  "thinking_budget": <int>,
  "baked_at": "<ISO-8601>"
}

Constraints:
- `per_cycle_intent` MUST contain exactly 30 entries,
  indexed 0..29 in order. Missing or extra
  entries are validation failures and your response will be rejected.
- `anticipation_offsets_ms` keys are stringified cycle indices;
  values are integers in [-500, 0].
- `overall_arc[*].cycle_range` covers [0, 29]
  contiguously without gaps or overlaps.
- All fields in the schema are required; do not invent extra keys.
- Keep `intent` strings concrete and in the Bayati visual register
  (moonlight on water, open palm in low candlelight, solitary figure,
  loose linen, breath on glass, single feather, head bowed in shadow,
  back at a window at night). Do not propose Hijaz architectural imagery.
